changelog: **Error-swallow audit cleared (Total → 0)**: swept the 4 remaining P1 + 1 P2 sites flagged by `scripts/check-no-swallowed-errors.mjs`. Documented waiver contract (line-comment only, same or previous line) in `mem://features/error-swallow-audit-generator`.
